reviews.comment:
Es un desastre es la única estación de servicio en 50 km a 100 km a la redonda y tienen un solo empleado con una demora de atención de aproximadamente 1:30 recomiendo no cargar nafta en ese lugar salvo que sea a la 1:30 a.m.

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster. It's the only gas station for 50 to 100 km around, and they only have one employee with a service delay of approximately 1 hour and 30 minutes. I recommend not filling up there unless it's at 1:30 a.m.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNweEtyTk1REAE

reviews.comment:
Agreguen más islas de carga y quizás cambie la calificación (57 minutos perdimos para cargar). En época de vacaciones la cola en ambos sentidos sale hasta la ruta, lo peor del caso es que yendo hacia el norte, tenés que recargar porque muchas veces en los pueblos hay pero bandera blanca...

(Translated by Google)
Add more charging stations and maybe the rating will change (we wasted 57 minutes charging). During holidays, the line in both directions stretches all the way to the highway. The worst part is that heading north, you have to recharge because often in the towns there are stations but they're closed...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNwaE96SUJREAE

reviews.comment:
En temporada alta de turismo
Siempre se quedan sin combustible
Y siempre es larga la espera....

(Translated by Google)
During peak tourist season
They always run out of fuel
And the wait is always long....
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKXy1TWXdnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Realmente los playeros merecen un premio....pero sinceramente YPF debería considerar seriamente y urgentemente la incorporación de más surtidores. Es un punto estratégico y perder más de 1 hora para cargar combustible no es justo. Ojalá pronto se aviven Shell o Axion

(Translated by Google)
The gas station attendants really deserve an award... but honestly, YPF should seriously and urgently consider adding more pumps. It's a strategic location, and losing more than an hour to refuel isn't fair. Hopefully, Shell and Axion will wake up soon.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdjdQSXdBRRAB

reviews.comment:

Great service...nice place...thinking of returning...

reviews.comment:
Pésima atención.  Un solo playero para dos surtidores. Media hora de cola!

(Translated by Google)
Terrible service. One attendant for two pumps. Half an hour wait!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKdjlqbkhBEAE

reviews.comment:
En general es un muy buen lugar para parar, pero si andas con poco tiempo, aguanta! Porque solo ahí una isla de carga de combustible y en vez de organizarse y hacer pasar las camionetas por la isla de los camiones (que es el mismo gasoil) la cierran... Más inoperante no se puede...

(Translated by Google)
Overall, it's a great place to stop, but if you're short on time, wait! Because there's only one fuel loading island there, and instead of organizing and getting the trucks through the truck island (which is the same as diesel), they close it off... It couldn't be more ineffective...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURKNzZXNGV3EAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
As always, the Argentine Automobile Club continues to be characterized by its cleanliness, friendly service, and variety of offerings.

reviews.comment:
Las 3 veces que pase no tenían combustible, la atención del servicompras un horror... Como si le estaríamos haciendo un favor al comprarle

(Translated by Google)
All three times I went there they were out of fuel, and the service at the convenience store was awful... As if we were doing them a favor by buying from them.

reviews.comment:
Siempre muy lleno. No es una buena opción para cargar nafta ahí. Más si coincide con feriados largos. Hay que tratar de cargar antes en lo posible y saltear esa

(Translated by Google)
It's always very crowded. It's not a good place to fill up, especially during long weekends. You should try to fill up earlier if possible and skip that station.
